title: CRITICAL: InputGroupAddon dead side prop — rendered as unrecognized DOM attribute
description: H1: `InputGroupAddonProps` defines `side?: 'left' | 'right'` but the implementation does `{ className, children, ...props }` — the `side` prop is never consumed, instead absorbed into `...props` and rendered as an unrecognized DOM attribute `side="left"` on the div. React logs a console warning. The prop has absolutely zero effect on styling or behavior.
resolution: Destructured side prop from InputGroupAddon to prevent DOM attribute leak
